caption: The video displays a static presentation slide. The text "Grant agreements" is printed in black in the upper-left area of the scene, and a large red triangular warning sign containing a black exclamation mark is centered below the text. In the top right corner, a small inset video window shows a person with short hair wearing a dark top, positioned in front of a neutral background. A large yellow square containing a black number "3" is partially visible, overlapping the right edge of the main slide area. At the bottom of the screen, a thin yellow banner runs horizontally, featuring a small logo with the letters "MHP" and a small silhouette of a person. The visual elements, including the text "Grant agreements", the warning icon, and the inset video of the person, remain identical across all frames, indicating a still shot of a presentation.
